scripts.start: node --env-file=.env -e "const { spawnSync } = require('node:child_process'); const apiUrl = JSON.stringify(process.env.NG_APP_API_URL || 'http://localhost:3000'); const result = spawnSync('node', ['./node_modules/@angular/cli/bin/ng', 'serve', '--define', 'NG_APP_API_URL=' + apiUrl], { stdio: 'inherit' }); process.exit(result.status ?? 1);"
scripts.build: node --env-file=.env -e "const { spawnSync } = require('node:child_process'); const apiUrl = JSON.stringify(process.env.NG_APP_API_URL || 'http://localhost:3000'); const result = spawnSync('node', ['./node_modules/@angular/cli/bin/ng', 'build', '--define', 'NG_APP_API_URL=' + apiUrl], { stdio: 'inherit' }); process.exit(result.status ?? 1);"
scripts.watch: node --env-file=.env -e "const { spawnSync } = require('node:child_process'); const apiUrl = JSON.stringify(process.env.NG_APP_API_URL || 'http://localhost:3000'); const result = spawnSync('node', ['./node_modules/@angular/cli/bin/ng', 'build', '--watch', '--configuration', 'development', '--define', 'NG_APP_API_URL=' + apiUrl], { stdio: 'inherit' }); process.exit(result.status ?? 1);"
